title: Smoky Tofu Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry made with smoky tofu and a variety of vegetables. Serve over rice or noodles for a delicious meal.

ingredients.name: silk
ingredients.notes: any type of silk cabbage or bok choy works

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the silk cabbage and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the crumbled tofu and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the smoky tofu and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
